summary: Tested admin password persistence bug fix and DataTab.jsx white-theme redesign. All tests passed. Password persistence works correctly - old password is rejected after change. DataTab shows white-themed stacked vertical backup tables as designed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password persistence bug is FIXED. DataTab white-theme redesign is complete and working.

frontend_ui_tests: White-theme verification - PASS (bg-white cards, clean borders)
Full-width tables with headers (File Name, Date/Time, Size, Actions) - PASS
Delete All button visible per section - PASS
Backup Folder info card with Select Drive button - PASS
Auto-delete toggle with days input - PASS
Storage Engine card showing MongoDB - PASS

password_persistence_bug_fix.details: After POST /api/auth/change-password, the OLD password is correctly REJECTED (401) and the NEW password works. The DEFAULT_USERS backdoor has been removed from login flow - users are seeded into DB on first login, then only DB is checked.

datatab_white_theme_redesign.white_backgrounds: ✓ Cards have bg-white class with 2px slate borders
datatab_white_theme_redesign.stacked_vertical_layout: ✓ Three separate backup tables stacked top-to-bottom (NOT side-by-side grid)
datatab_white_theme_redesign.full_width_tables: ✓ Tables span full width with proper headers
datatab_white_theme_redesign.delete_all_buttons: ✓ Visible in section headers when items exist
datatab_white_theme_redesign.backup_folder_card: ✓ Shows default folder with Select Drive button
datatab_white_theme_redesign.restore_buttons: ✓ ZIP Upload & Restore + JSON Upload & Restore

delete_all_functionality.details: Delete All shows confirmation dialog (Nahi/Haan, Karein) - single click + confirm, not double-click required

code_review_notes.auth_py_line_64_101: Login endpoint correctly seeds default users into DB on first attempt, then ONLY checks DB - no USERS dict backdoor
code_review_notes.auth_py_line_118_151: Change-password endpoint updates password in DB correctly
code_review_notes.datatab_jsx: White-theme redesign complete with stacked vertical layout, proper accent colors, and all required UI elements
